description: As a housing policy analyst at the San Francisco Planning Department, develop a Displacement Risk Index (DRI) for every zone containing residential households and buildings using the San Francisco UrbanSim dataset at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. The index must incorporate household vulnerability (concentration of low-income residents), housing precarity (age and quality of building stock), and development pressure (proximity to maximum allowed density). Define the metrics, weighting, and normalization methods in the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/displacement_risk.ipynb. Export the final data to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/displacement_risk.csv including columns for zone_id, dri_score, vulnerability_score
